candidates.why: Component of revenue; matches top-line from goods and services and aligns with total revenue level.
Primary consolidated top-line revenue measure; matches target definition of total revenue/sales.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Represents operating result, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Uses ‘Total revenue’ as primary consolidated revenue line, with ‘Revenue from Goods & Services’ as an alternate label for other periods per priority rule.

candidates.why: Direct cost of materials sold; best match for COGS/cost of sales.
Operating personnel costs; more appropriately SG&A than COGS for PROF mapping.
General operating overhead; fits SG&A, not direct COGS.
Overhead expense; should be treated as SG&A component if used, not COGS.
Selling/marketing expense; belongs in SG&A, not COGS.
Overhead/other operating costs; SG&A rather than COGS.
Financing costs, not production costs.
Financing costs, not production costs.
Net financial result; not COGS.
R&D capitalization adjustment; not core COGS.
Inventory component, not income statement expense.
Liability, not COGS line.

variables.notes: ‘Cost of material’ clearly represents direct production/material costs and is the appropriate COGS proxy.

candidates.why: Personnel and related overhead costs; classic SG&A component.
General overhead operating expenses; fits SG&A definition.
Additional other operating overhead; fits SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization expense; rules say to exclude D&A from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selects multiple overhead components (personnel and other operating expenses) and excludes amortization per XSGA rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization related to R&D assets, not the core R&D expense itself.
Explicit research and development expense line on the income statement; best match for R&D expense.
Capitalized portion of R&D; supplemental adjustment, not the main expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D; supplemental, not the core period R&D expense.
Balance sheet capitalized development costs, not period expense.
Accumulated amortization; balance sheet, not expense.
Capitalized development expenditure; balance sheet item, not the income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: Maps XRD to the explicit ‘R&D’ income statement line representing research and development expense.

candidates.why: Net interest line; includes both interest income and expense.
Pure interest expense line; best conceptual match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense component related to lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Net finance result mixing interest and other finance items; secondary fallback if pure interest lines unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful as additional fallback series.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provides a priority list favoring pure interest expense, then lease-interest components, then net interest and net finance as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not total book equity.
Label suggests an equity component, but no numeric preview; not the total.
Appears to be part of equity (e.g., other reserves/retained); not the full total equity line.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; best proxy for book equity (no separate non-controlling interests line exists).
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Uses ‘Total Equity’ as book equity since there is no separate parent vs non-controlling interests split; MIB will be set to 0.
No line items for non-controlling/minority interests are present on the balance sheet; MIB is treated as 0.
